rootAdvisory.affectedApi: UUID v3/v5/v6 when a caller supplies an output buffer
rootAdvisory.observedUsage: xcode@3.0.1 calls uuid.v4() without an output buffer in lib/pbxProject.js
rootAdvisory.runtimeExposure: build-time iOS project generation dependency; not imported by Starward mobile runtime code

remediation.decision: rejected because it violates the locked Expo SDK 57 / React Native 0.86 baseline and is not a security upgrade
remediation.nextAction: Track Expo config-plugins/xcode remediation and rerun audit on every dependency update; do not mark production security complete solely from this reachability review.
